title: Class A-4
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
'''Class A-4''' was a promotion granted by [[King/Legends|Queen]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] of [[Aquilae (The Star Wars)|Aquilae]] for the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[R2-D2/Legends|Artwo]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|Threepio]] following the destruction of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Death Star/Legends|space fortress]].

==Behind the scenes==
The idea of a reward for the droids drops out of the draft scripts to [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|Episode IV]], though [[George Lucas|Lucas]] did not wholly abandon the idea. In his background notes composed for licensees in [[1977]], he states that C-3PO was given a [[XB21 memory system]] and a refurbishment, and R2-D2 was cleaned and repaired with new parts following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==Sources==
